prompt: Can you check the WACC formula in my legacy model? I want to make sure the math is right before we do anything else with it.
assertions: Reads the WACC formula from the model and presents its LaTeX equivalent
Verifies that only the debt term is multiplied by (1 - Tax Rate)
Verifies cost of equity and cost of debt are in consistent units
Confirms the formula is mathematically correct (WACC ≈ 9.19%)
Flags the cell-coordinate references as an IDFA violation
